query: SELECT id, agentId, name, lastHeartbeat, status, activeCalls, maxCalls, ipAddress, NOW() as serverNow, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lastHeartbeat, NOW()) as secondsSinceHeartbeat FROM pbx_agents ORDER BY lastHeartbeat DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3tmNk4KiQphQsi9.6a10ffd04b61 --database QaP68Z2AATogwpccsoDAFH --execute SELECT id, agentId, name, lastHeartbeat, status, activeCalls, maxCalls, ipAddress, NOW() as serverNow, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lastHeartbeat, NOW()) as secondsSinceHeartbeat FROM pbx_agents ORDER BY lastHeartbeat DESC;
